title: Dubrovnik, Dubrovnik-Neretva — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Dubrovnik, Dubrovnik-Neretva: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Dubrovnik is a city in Dubrovnik-Neretva with a population of 42,615. The Pearl of the Adriatic, a UNESCO-listed medieval walled city with stunning marble streets, Baroque architecture, and crystal-clear Adriatic waters.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
